skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.description: Debug any bug methodically instead of guessing: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify, fix, confirm.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Commit Message
skills.description: Write clear, conventional git commit messages that explain what changed and why.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Safe Refactor
skills.description: Refactor code without breaking it: tests-first, small behavior-preserving steps, commit after each move.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: PR Review
skills.description: Review a pull request thoroughly and constructively: correctness, security, tests, readability, kind feedback.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: Conduct comprehensive research on any topic — clarifying questions, structured web search, synthesis with confidence markers and sources.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: TDD Workflow
skills.description: Write tests first, then code. Red → Green → Refactor loop with naming conventions, AAA structure, and coverage targets.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Prompt Architect
skills.description: Design clear, testable prompts for AI agents. Build sequence, quality checklist, anti-patterns, and iteration loop.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Product Spec (PRD)
skills.description: Write a complete product requirements document from a rough idea — problem, goals, user stories, requirements, metrics, open questions.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Meeting Notes
skills.description: Turn raw meeting transcripts into structured minutes with decisions, action items, owners, and parking lot. Works for standup, retro, 1:1, planning.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Review a diff for correctness, security, performance, and maintainability. Returns prioritized findings (P0–P2) with suggested fixes.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.description: Security-focused code audit: OWASP Top 10, injection, auth flaws, secrets, dependency CVEs. Returns CVSS-style severity findings.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Architecture Design
skills.description: Design system architecture from requirements — component diagram, data flow, ADRs, failure modes, tradeoffs.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Growth Experiment
skills.description: Design and analyze A/B tests and growth experiments — hypothesis format, sample size, statistical significance, decision framework.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: API Design
skills.description: Design REST or GraphQL APIs — resource naming, HTTP methods, error formats, versioning, auth patterns, documentation checklist.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Decision Log (ADR)
skills.description: Record an architectural, product, or business decision as an ADR with context, options, rationale, and review triggers.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: User Story
skills.description: Write well-formed user stories with acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then), story points, INVEST checklist, and splitting strategies.
skills.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Engineering Essentials
bundles.description: The core day-to-day developer workflow: debug, refactor, review, commit, and test like a pro.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Security Pack
bundles.description: Full security coverage: audit code for vulnerabilities, review PRs with security lens, design secure APIs.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Product Builder
bundles.description: Build products right: from idea to spec to user stories to experiment. The full product development loop.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Research Analyst
bundles.description: Research anything deeply and record decisions clearly: deep web research with synthesis plus structured ADRs.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: System Architect
bundles.description: Design systems properly: architecture diagrams, API contracts, decision records, and security modeling.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Async Team Pack
bundles.description: Work effectively across time zones: structured meeting notes, clear user stories, and decision logs everyone can read later.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: AI Engineering
bundles.description: Build reliable AI systems: design prompts that work, audit outputs, run research-grade experiments.
bundles.author: NeiP4n
